title: Global cloud platform outage — 72-hour multi-region failure
historical_analogue: 2021 AWS us-east-1 outage, 2023 Azure multi-region outage, CrowdStrike 2024
description: A cascading failure in BGP routing tables combined with DNS infrastructure issues takes down all three major cloud providers for 72 hours. Amazon, Walmart, Netflix, Zoom, Slack, GitHub, and 80% of the internet becomes unavailable. $15B/day in e-commerce evaporates.
